patch.value: Read-only code audit of src/core/store/, src/core/history/, src/core/item/, src/core/fs/, src/core/checkpoint/, src/core/search/ to identify genuine forward gaps for the two capability epics pm-o2kc and pm-ydp6.

value.author: audit-data-agent
value.text:
## Audit findings summary

### Files audited
- src/core/store/item-store.ts, settings.ts, settings-validator.ts, front-matter-cache.ts, paths.ts, item-format-migration.ts
- src/core/history/history.ts, drift-scan.ts, replay.ts, history-compact.ts, history-storage-stats.ts, history-stream-policy.ts
- src/core/item/item-format.ts, item-record.ts, toon-decode.ts, type-registry.ts
- src/core/fs/fs-utils.ts, path-utils.ts
- src/core/checkpoint/mutation-checkpoint.ts
- src/core/search/providers.ts, relevance.ts, staleness.ts, vector-stores.ts, background-refresh.ts, corpus.ts, cache.ts, embedding-batches.ts, vectorization-metadata.ts, semantic-defaults.ts

### Health/stats snapshot (2026-06-07)
- pm health: ok, 1057 items, 0 stale vectors, provider=ollama, store=lancedb
- pm stats --storage: 1063 streams, 17753 entries, 19.5MB total; largest: pm-th6y (686 entries, 19.5MB), pm-wo8 (498 entries)

### Items already covered (CLOSED, not duplicated)
Storage: pm gc locks (pm-gbbn, pm-d70h), TOON bracket-bug (pm-idnz), pm history-compact (pm-3pbq), drift-scan mtime (pm-up22), pm stats --storage (pm-mnee), dual write-path doc (pm-k5r6)
Search: pm-75du (weight contract drift), pm-arew (open status default), pm-ec4s (--status filter), pm-7tsx (rerank+expansion), pm-usw2 (collection name), pm-22x2/pm-fhsg (eval harness), pm-tnk5/pm-cxdg (corpus limit), pm-cy8i (per-query weight)

### Key gaps found
1. No auto-compact policy/threshold (pm-0pnz)
2. gc missing checkpoints/ scope (pm-tyj8)
3. gc runtime scope missing drift-cache.json (pm-7n8v)
4. No bulk history-compact --all-over N (pm-f3pa)
5. writeFileAtomic no EXDEV handling (pm-6vv6)
6. appendLineAtomic not truly atomic for large entries (pm-xy9n)
7. No closed-items sweep for history GC (pm-yj9w)
8. No format-version stamp for migration gating (pm-ae1u)
9. Eval harness not actually in CI (pm-u8n5)
10. No min-score threshold filter (pm-cstl)
11. Silent skip on embedding identity change, no migration UX (pm-wt0g)
12. Full reindex doesn't default to stale-only (pm-o3nr)
13. pending-refresh.json not in gc --scope embeddings (pm-3b1t)
14. type/priority/assignee absent from semantic corpus (pm-jyie)
15. No offline/BM25 fallback provider (pm-75k9)
16. No persistent hybrid_semantic_weight setting (pm-2xwh)
